article_title: ASP.NET Core API 部署指南
core_theme: 把 ASP.NET Core Web API 部署到 Docker 和 Azure 的生产化路径
reader_takeaway: 读者能按顺序理解 Docker 镜像、Compose 本地环境、健康检查、Azure 部署目标、密钥管理和启动性能的关键取舍
summary_angle: 先把容器做对，再补上本地依赖、健康探针、Azure 运行平台、密钥和性能优化

information_blocks.source_anchor: Multi-stage Docker Build for .NET 10: use sdk:10.0 for build and aspnet:10.0 for runtime
information_blocks.visual_idea: 第一个部署门显示 Docker 镜像和构建块，表示多阶段镜像

information_blocks.source_anchor: Docker Compose for Local Development: API, SQL Server, depends_on service_healthy, double underscore env vars
information_blocks.visual_idea: 第二个门显示本地数据库、API 和 Compose 网络

information_blocks.source_anchor: Health Checks: /health/live and /health/ready for container orchestrators
information_blocks.visual_idea: 第三个门显示健康盾牌和 liveness/readiness 两个端点

information_blocks.source_anchor: Publishing to Azure App Service, Azure Container Apps, Secrets Management with Key Vault
information_blocks.visual_idea: 第四个门显示 Azure、容器平台和密钥盾牌

main_metaphor: 一个 .NET API 容器沿部署通道穿过四道生产检查门
subject_action: 容器从镜像构建、本地验证、健康探针一路进入 Azure 运行环境
composition: 2.35:1 宽幅，左到右四个检查门，中间容器作为主焦点
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: dark fantasy illustration, gothic silhouettes, ancient textures, moody rim light, restrained magical atmosphere
selected_style_reason: 随机选中；用克制的关卡/闸门隐喻表达生产部署必须经过的安全检查和运行门槛
style_safety_note: 该风格不指向特定品牌、工作室或在世艺术家，prompt 明确排除恐怖、怪物和血腥元素
draft_goal: 验证读者能看出 Docker 镜像、本地依赖、健康检查和 Azure 部署四个节点
revision_targets: 如果画面过暗影响阅读，增强 Azure blue 和 gold checkpoint 光源
如果出现真实产品 UI，改为概念插画
如果出现无关幻想元素，移除并强化技术检查点
final_prompt: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration for a Chinese tech blog article about deploying ASP.NET Core Web API to Docker and Azure. Theme: production API passes through deployment gates: Docker image, local compose dependencies, health checks, Azure runtime/secrets. Keep one central .NET container package and four short labels: 镜像/1, 本地/2, 健康/3, Azure/4. Base style: editorial technical illustration. Selected style: dark fantasy illustration with gothic silhouettes, ancient textures, moody rim light, restrained magical atmosphere, adapted professionally with no horror and no creatures. Wide 2.35:1 cover. Avoid real portal UI, fake dashboard, fake terminals, fake code text, fabricated metrics, long text, watermark, monsters, and gore.
